data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement regarding 'Power/catering/water access notes,' but there is no evidence provided that confirms this requirement is covered. The linked use case mentions the need for these notes, yet no API reads or persisted state checks were performed to verify their existence or enforcement. This lack of evidence leads to a clear gap in satisfying the requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the existence or enforcement of power/catering/water access notes.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
